metadata.description: A collection of metaskills for collaborative discovery, PRD creation, skill building, software engineering law audits, and Whatbox/rTorrent control

plugins.name: metaskills
plugins.description: Metaskills for collaborative discovery, PRD creation, and skill building

plugins.name: software-eng-laws
plugins.description: Audit a repository against 56 software engineering laws (Conway, Hyrum, DRY, CAP, etc.) and produce a per-law findings report with evidence citations and a scorecard

plugins.name: whatbox-rtorrent
plugins.description: List and control torrents on a Whatbox seedbox via rTorrent XML-RPC (list, start, stop, pause, resume) using stdlib-only Python
